videos.title: Noctua Says THIS is Thermal Paste

videos.title: The PC-book Neo is HERE from Intel (Also New Gaming Handhelds)
videos.description:
Check out the Cooler Master MWE Gold 1000 V4 with GPU Shield: https://www.newegg.com/cooler-master-atx-3-1-1000-w-80-plus-gold-certified-power-supplies-black-mpm-a0f4-afg-c3b0bus/p/N82E16817171249

Intel Core Series 3 'Wildcat Lake' laptops are here and putting affordable PC laptops BACK on the menu. These aren't your schools cheapo-feeling Chromebooks either. These are premium-feeling machines with prices that take a direct aim at the MacBook Neo.

Discuss on the forum: https://linustechtips.co

videos.title: NVIDIA Just Slapped Apple Silicon - RTX Spark
videos.description:
Thanks to ASUS for sponsoring this video! Learn more about the ASUS P16 and P14 powered by NVIDIA RTX Spark: https://asus.click/h7407_ltt

NVIDIA just unveiled RTX Spark, a groundbreaking ARM-based superchip bringing 128GB of unified memory, 6000+ CUDA cores, and local 120B parameter AI model capabilities directly to next-gen Windows on ARM laptops.

videos.title: Every Little Thing is BETTER - ASUS ROG XBOX Ally X20 Anniversary Announcement
videos.description:
Check out the ASUS ROG XBOX Ally X20: https://asus.click/ally_ltt

Up until now, the ASUS ROG Xbox Ally X has been a great handheld, but not without a few features on the wishlist. At Computex 2026, Linus had a chance to check out the all-new 20th anniversary version of ASUS's prized handheld, and this time they've made it their mission to check every box. But did they actually do it? Let's find out.

videos.title: Who has the Worst Monitor at Linus Tech Tips?
videos.description:
Thanks to MSI for sponsoring this video and send us their new MPG 322UR QD-OLED X24 monitor! Head to https://msi.gm/SC5E0747 to check it out and grab your own!

You spend big on your PC, but forget the display? We're judging three LMG employees for committing this classic blunder! Watch us roast Peter, Kassandra, and Elijah's setups before giving the most neglected display a massive upgrade to the 4K 240Hz MSI MPG 322UR QD-OLED monitor. Who has the worst monitor at LMG?
